name: Shredded Chicken Sesame
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon Chinese hot pepper oil to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the shredded chicken in a bowl.
2. Mix the remaining ingredients together to form a salad dressing.
3. Toss the chicken with the dressing.
4. Arrange on a platter.
5. Garnish with more chopped green onions, if desired.
